title: Dimensional Standards
summary: Lot size, setbacks, height, and coverage requirements.

sections.title: Section 3-1 Lot Area
sections.excerpt: Minimum lot area standards apply to all principal uses.

sections.title: Section 3-2 Setbacks
sections.excerpt: Front, side, and rear setbacks must be met for new construction.

sections.title: Section 3-3 Building Height
sections.excerpt: Maximum building height is regulated by district.
